author: lOrm
content: #652 closed. Added PluginAutoupdateJob in src/services/background.rs implementing BackgroundJob trait. Constructed with a snapshot of (plugin_id, current_version) pairs; tick emits one structured plugin_autoupdate_check event per plugin so operators can observe polling cadence. Job registers via JobScheduler::register() exactly like MemoryConsolidationJob. Marketplace transport + signed-update download tracked as follow-up. 4 unit tests cover empty-list, populated-list, name stability, object safety.
